docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.
This project experiments with adding Tuftean sidenotes to Material for MkDocs. It's a bit simpler than what you'll find in the Tufte CSS and more like what Bureau Gorbunov projects use. This is a margin note – a sidenote without a footnote-style number. Footnotes aren't implemented yet, but would be nice to have, too.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
